# typeInformation

**Instance Property**

Returns the MTRDeviceType corresponding to deviceTypeID, or nil if deviceTypeID does not represent a known device type.

## Declaration

```swift
@NSCopying var typeInformation: MTRDeviceType? { get }
```
title: typeInformation
